# Martian Chronicles

Martian Chronicles is a premium personal knowledge platform.

It is NOT just a blog.

It will evolve into:

- Technical Articles
- Personal Blog
- Learning Notes
- Resource Library
- Projects
- Writing Platform

Primary Domain

martianchronicles.nirajmourya.in

## Design

Inspired by

- Mars Colony
- SpaceX
- Vercel
- Apple

Characteristics

- Minimal
- Premium
- Futuristic
- Professional
- Calm
- Readable

Dark mode should be default.

Light mode must also be supported.

## Brand

Primary color

Martian Orange

Typography

Headings

Space Grotesk

Body

Inter

Icons

Minimal

Flat

Professional

No skeuomorphic icons.

## Tech Stack

Next.js 15
React 19
TypeScript
Material UI 7
MDX

## Code Quality

Always

- use TypeScript
- use functional components
- avoid duplicated code
- use reusable components
- write production-ready code
- follow accessibility best practices
- optimize for Lighthouse

Never

- hardcode colors
- hardcode spacing
- create monolithic components

Favor composition over inheritance.

Every component should support dark and light themes.
